overall.description: Nighttime driving scene from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a vehicle navigating a winding hillside road lined with palm trees and modern street lights, approaching and entering a tunnel with a 'CAUTION' sign, with the distant city skyline visible through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside arterial road with palm tree landscaping

events.description: navigating a gentle left curve on the winding hillside road
silver sedan overtakes on the left side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding hillside road at steady speed, following the leftward curve

notable_agents.action: silver sedan overtaking on the left side of the road

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the left side of the road
row of palm trees and dense vegetation on the right hillside
tall pole with horizontal LED light bar illuminating the road
concrete barrier with continuous orange LED lighting on top
tall illuminated skyscrapers visible through the hazy night atmosphere
steep earthen slope with tropical vegetation and rocks

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a winding hillside road at night, flanked by palm trees and modern street lighting. The distant city skyline glows through the hazy atmosphere while a silver sedan overtakes on the left. LED-lit guardrails line the left side of the wet asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel approach with caution signage and concrete retaining walls

events.description: tunnel entrance with yellow 'CAUTION' sign comes into view ahead
red sports car overtakes on the right before entering the tunnel

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while approaching the tunnel entrance, maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: red sports car overtaking on the right side before the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: dark rectangular tunnel opening with concrete frame and overhead lighting
illuminated yellow sign with black 'CAUTION' text above the tunnel
steep concrete wall supporting the hillside near the tunnel mouth

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the tunnel entrance where a yellow 'CAUTION' sign hangs overhead. The landscape transitions to concrete retaining walls as the city skyline fades from view. A red sports car overtakes on the right before entering the tunnel portal.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete vehicular tunnel with linear ceiling lighting

events.description: entering the tunnel, lighting shifts to enclosed fluorescent ceiling lights
passing a slower vehicle on the left inside the tunnel

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the enclosed tunnel, following the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the tunnel, maintaining distance

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls with vertical seams and reflective surfaces
continuous linear LED light strips running along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through the enclosed concrete tunnel, illuminated by linear fluorescent ceiling lights. The smooth gray walls create a narrow corridor effect as the vehicle follows traffic ahead. The tunnel entrance disappears behind as the vehicle continues through the artificially lit underground passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit hillside road into the enclosed confines of a concrete tunnel. It begins with the vehicle navigating a winding path flanked by palm trees and LED-lit guardrails, while a silver sedan overtakes on the left against a backdrop of a glowing, hazy city skyline. As the vehicle approaches the tunnel entrance, the open landscape shifts to concrete retaining walls and the city skyline fades from view, just as a red sports car passes on the right. The scene then transitions fully into the underground passage, where the open night air is replaced by a narrow corridor of smooth gray walls. Finally, the camera follows the flow of traffic under the steady glow of linear fluorescent ceiling lights as the tunnel entrance disappears behind.
